name: session-coach
description: Review how the user directed the agent in this session and provide actionable coaching on prompts, decomposition, verification, and conversation flow.

interface.shortDescription: Get feedback on how you used the agent in this session
interface.longDescription: Session Coach reviews how you directed the agent in a Codex session. It can do a quick preflight setup check before work starts or generate a retrospective report with evidence-based feedback on prompt quality, task decomposition, verification habits, and conversation flow.
defaultPrompt: Use $session-coach to check whether this repo is ready for an agentic coding session.
Use $session-coach to review how I used the agent in this session.
Use $session-coach to analyze this session and suggest better next prompts.
